title: icysoulmarine

https://www.youtube.com/live/OMH87odx6Zc?si=KgElZ4ARHgL8ZMuV
body:
# ❄ IcySoulMarine Trident – Anvil Rename Texture Pack

## 🌊 About This Pack
**IcySoulMarine Trident** is a custom rename-based texture pack for Minecraft that transforms the default Trident into a mystical frozen ocean weapon.

Simply rename your Trident in an anvil to:

> **IcySoulMarine**

And the texture will automatically change into a sharp prismarine-themed trident infused with icy energy.

Inspired by the cold strength of an iceberg, the flowing power of a soul, and the elegance of prismarine from the deep sea, this pack gives your Trident a legendary ocean-frost aesthetic without changing gameplay mechanics.

✔ Purely visual  
✔ Survival-friendly  
✔ Lightweight resource pack  

![sanopalz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c5f43ffe1de48bc7a559e757ea5a8aa5d691654.png)

---

## 🌟 Features
- Rename-based texture using Anvil  
- Frozen prismarine design  
- Works in Survival & Multiplayer  
- No mods required (OptiFine optional)  
- Fantasy & Ocean themed style  

---

## ⚙ Installation Guide

### 🧊 Vanilla / OptiFine Version
1. Download the resource pack `.zip`
2. Open Minecraft → **Options → Resource Packs**
3. Click **Open Pack Folder**
4. Move the `.zip` into the folder
5. Enable the pack
6. Go in-game → Rename a Trident to **IcySoulMarine** in an Anvil

Done! ✨

---

### 🔧 Server Version (Oraxen / ItemsAdder)

If you run a server using plugins like Oraxen or ItemsAdder:

1. Import the texture into your plugin resource pack
2. Set rename trigger to **IcySoulMarine**
3. Reload resource pack
4. Test in-game

Perfect for RPG or SMP servers.

---

## ✅ Compatibility
- Minecraft 1.20+
- Works with OptiFine CIT
- Works with Oraxen rename system
- Works with ItemsAdder rename system
- No gameplay changes (safe for servers)

---

## 🎥 Created Live
This texture was designed live during a streaming session:
[Live Project - Sanopalz](https://www.youtube.com/live/OMH87odx6Zc?si=KgElZ4ARHgL8ZMuV)

---

![sanopalz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af6b78db924f5ba237ada70919985c6c0f29a8cd.png)

---

## 🌌 Lore
*Icy like an iceberg,*  
*Soul that flows in your hand,*  
*Marine in the sharpness of prismarine.*  

A weapon born from the frozen ocean depths.

---

Craft your legend.  
Rename your Trident.  
Awaken the frozen tide. ❄🌊
